notes: Action-phase closure shard for the target_filter_or_eligibility willingness sub-bucket.
Only direct willing-target findings are closed here; mixed object, passenger, self/other, or resurrection eligibility findings remain open.

heroism::manual_willing_target.issue: Heroism requires a willing creature, but willingness is not represented as target eligibility data.
heroism::manual_willing_target.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by Target Willingness propagation: structured markdown now records Target Willingness and the runtime target filter records willing=required for this spell.
heroism::manual_willing_target.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by Target Willingness propagation: targeting.filter.willing is required for this spell and not_applicable elsewhere.
heroism::manual_willing_target.reviewerNote: Closed because this finding was limited to direct willing-target eligibility; mixed target-filter findings remain actionable_open in their original shards.
